fields.name: Attached Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the document was attached.

fields.name: File Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the attached file.

fields.name: File Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the attachment is.

fields.name: File Extension
fields.tooltip: Specifies the file extension of the attachment.

fields.name: User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who attached the document.

fields.name: Document Flow Purchase
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the attachment must flow to transactions.

fields.name: Document Flow Sales
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the attachment must flow to transactions.

fields.name: Document Flow Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the attachment must flow to transactions.

fields.name: Document Flow Production
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the attachment must flow to transactions.
